validation.redactionBoundary: synthetic response review-runbook validator fixtures only; no real validation receipt, response envelope path, account, credential, provider payload, response payload, order payload, token, app key, app secret, execution, fill, or order confirmation content

safetyNotes: the owner-supplied redacted response validation result receipt path is provided later and is not read by this contract
review output may record hashes and redacted status later, but must not record receipt paths, raw response values, or provider payloads
successful response receipt review is not provider call authorization clearance
successful response receipt review is not runtime route, UI, DB, order, or live trading clearance
